name: Rocket Matter Legal Practice Management API
what_it_does: Rocket Matter legal practice management REST API for law firms, legal departments, and legal technology developers to manage case and matter management, time tracking, billing, client invoicing, trust accounting, and document management — enabling programmatic legal workflow automation, billing integration, and legal data access through Rocket Matter's cloud-based practice management platform. Enables AI agents to manage matter creation for client case workflow automation, handle time entry for legal billing automation, access invoice generation for client billing automation, retrieve trust accounting for IOLTA compliance automation, manage contact management for client and opposing counsel automation, handle calendar entry for legal deadline automation, access document management for case file automation, retrieve payment processing for legal fee collection automation, manage reporting for billing analytics automation, and integrate Rocket Matter with Outlook, QuickBooks, and payment processors for end-to-end legal practice automation.
use_cases: Creating legal matters and tracking time entries for law firm billing automation agents
Generating client invoices and processing payments for legal billing workflow automation agents
Managing IOLTA trust accounting for law firm compliance and disbursement automation agents
Integrating Rocket Matter with QuickBooks for law firm accounting synchronization automation agents
not_for: Large enterprise law firms requiring contract lifecycle management (CLM) at scale (Ironclad or Icertis are better)
E-discovery and document review platforms (Relativity or Everlaw are specialized for litigation e-discovery)
Court filing automation (Rocket Matter is practice management, not eFiling)
best_when: A small to mid-size law firm, solo attorney, or legal technology developer wanting AI agents to automate matter management, time tracking, billing, and trust accounting through Rocket Matter's legal practice management platform.
avoid_when: API ACCESS REQUIRES HIGHER PLAN: Rocket Matter API access requires Professional or Enterprise subscription; automated lower-tier API assumption creates no API access; automated must have appropriate subscription tier for API. IOLTA TRUST ACCOUNTING HAS STRICT RULES: Trust accounting for IOLTA compliance has state bar-specific requirements; automated generic billing assumption creates trust accounting compliance error; automated must implement state-specific IOLTA rules for trust fund management. MATTER VS CASE NOMENCLATURE: Rocket Matter uses 'matter' (not 'case') as the primary work unit; automated case-centric model assumption creates data model mismatch; automated must use Rocket Matter's matter-centric API model. BILLING RATE STRUCTURES ARE COMPLEX: Law firm billing can include flat fee, hourly, contingency, and hybrid arrangements; automated single billing rate assumption creates incomplete billing configuration; automated must configure appropriate billing rate type per attorney and matter.

auth.notes: Rocket Matter uses OAuth 2.0 for API authentication. REST API with JSON. Fort Lauderdale, FL HQ. Founded 2007 by Larry Port. Products: Matter management, time tracking, billing, trust accounting, document management, client portal, calendar, integrations. SDKs: None public. Acquired by ProfitSolv in 2019. Cloud-based legal practice management. ABA, IOLTA compliant. Competes with Clio and MyCase for legal practice management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: 14-day trial; API requires Professional or Enterprise plan
pricing.notes: Fort Lauderdale FL. Professional plan for API. IOLTA, ABA compliant. ProfitSolv subsidiary.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; matter and billing APIs throttled

known_agent_gotchas: PROFESSIONAL PLAN REQUIRED FOR API: Rocket Matter API requires Professional ($65/month) or Enterprise subscription; automated entry-level plan API assumption creates 403 Forbidden; automated must upgrade to Professional plan before API integration

MATTER IS THE PRIMARY ENTITY: Rocket Matter organizes all work around 'matters' (not 'cases'); automated case-centric data model assumption creates wrong API entity mapping; automated must map all legal work to Rocket Matter's matter entity

IOLTA TRUST ACCOUNTING IS STATE-BAR-SPECIFIC: IOLTA rules vary by state bar jurisdiction; automated uniform trust accounting assumption creates state-specific compliance issue; automated must implement state bar-specific trust accounting rules for each jurisdiction served

TIME ENTRIES REQUIRE BILLING CODE: Rocket Matter time entries typically require practice area or billing code; automated time entry without code assumption creates validation error; automated must pre-populate billing codes from matter configuration

TRUST VS OPERATING ACCOUNT: Rocket Matter maintains separate trust and operating account ledgers; automated unified account assumption creates trust accounting error; automated must explicitly designate whether payments go to trust or operating account
agent_readiness.security_notes: Legal practice management. ABA rules, IOLTA. OAuth2. US. Client matter and billing data. Attorney-client privilege considerations.

security_score_components.security_notes: Legal practice management. ABA, IOLTA. OAuth2. US. Client matter and confidential legal data.
